case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $33,456.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $33,456.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NTC OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY NABIL NIJEM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NOTICE OF CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT NABIL NIJEM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF TRACY SACCA (TRANSACTION ID # 60882642) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
EXHIBITS TO DECLARATION OF TRACY SACCA (TRANSACTION ID # 60882642) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY CLAIMANT NABIL NIJEM AND FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $16,728.00 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY MICHAEL GAINES ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT NABIL NIJEM. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $16,728.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: $33,456.00 U.S. CURRENCY, HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 120-063-481 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
